patch.value: Milestone calendar_item_without_schedule warning should include actionable hint (GH-174)
Warning is bare calendar_item_without_schedule:<id>:no_deadline_or_reminder_or_event. Append hint: set --deadline, --reminder or link an event. GitHub issue #174.

value.author: validate-autofix-agent
value.text: Kept the structured prefix 'calendar_item_without_schedule:<id>:no_deadline_or_reminder_or_event' byte-stable (telemetry/automation match on it) and appended the actionable hint after the token: '(hint: set --deadline <ISO> or --reminder "<when>", or link an Event via --event "start=<ISO>,end=<ISO>"; otherwise this item never appears on pm calendar)'. The existing post-create stderr recipe line is unchanged; this fixes the machine-readable warnings[] entry agents actually see in --json output. Unit test asserts prefix stability + hint presence.

patch.value: Warning tells the agent how to attach a schedule
Structured prefix kept stable; hint naming --deadline, --reminder, and --event appended after the token at create.ts; covered by create-command.spec.ts test
Appended actionable hint to calendar_item_without_schedule warning
